case_title: MSW CAPITAL LLC. VS. CRAIG PERRY ET AL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL LLC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERRY, CRAIG $14,003.74 PRINCIPAL, $455.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,458.74, SEE SCANNED DOC

SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100039825), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL LLC. SERVED NOV-28-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-29-2018 AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, CRAIG

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL LLC. AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, CRAIG DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-18-2018
DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS (TRANSACTION ID # 100041559) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL LLC.
DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT C.C.P. 585(D) (TRANSACTION ID # 100041559) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL LLC.
AFFIDAVIT OF REASONABLE DILIGENCE (TRANSACTION ID # 100049311) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL LLC.

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, COURT JUDGMENT, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $580.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 (TRANSACTION ID # 100041559) AS TO DEFENDANT PERRY, CRAIG
DECLARATION RE: WAIVER OF INTEREST AND ATTORNEY FEES (TRANSACTION ID # 100041559) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MSW CAPITAL LLC.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 100041559) AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 5
